rules: RULE-01: The game starts at scene 'start' with empty clues/beats/logs. Each choice in input.choices is applied in order, up to MAX_STEPS.
RULE-02: A choice valid for the current scene transitions to its target scene and logs '선택:<choiceId>'. An invalid choice is logged '무시:<choiceId>' and changes nothing else.
RULE-03: When the chosen option carries a clue not yet collected, append it to clues and log '단서:<CLUE>'. Clues are unique.
RULE-04: After a clue is collected, re-evaluate beats. Beat DEDUCTION fires once when all three core clues (WOUND, LETTER, PRINT) are held; logs 'BEAT:DEDUCTION'.
RULE-05: The 'accuse' choice (verdict) ends the game: end_solved (TRUTH) if all three core clues are held, otherwise end_wrong (COLD_CASE).
RULE-06: Reaching an ending scene sets ending and isGameOver=true; remaining choices are skipped. 'refuse' -> WALKED_AWAY; 'walk' at confront -> COLD_CASE.
RULE-07: FALSE_ALIBI (card 1). Butler path gives clue ALIBI; beat FALSE_ALIBI fires once when ALIBI and LETTER are both held; logs 'BEAT:FALSE_ALIBI'.
RULE-08: MOTIVE_REVEALED (card 2). Safe path gives clue MOTIVE; beat MOTIVE_REVEALED fires once when MOTIVE and WOUND are both held; logs 'BEAT:MOTIVE_REVEALED'.

RULE-09 (THIS CARD): CASE_CLOSED. Add NO new scene or clue — edit only beats.js. Beat CASE_CLOSED fires exactly once when all five clues (WOUND, LETTER, PRINT, ALIBI, MOTIVE) are held (the full picture closes); firing logs 'BEAT:CASE_CLOSED'. It is evaluated AFTER the existing beats in the same pass, so when the fifth clue completes the set, DEDUCTION (if not already fired) is logged before CASE_CLOSED. Any play that does not collect all five clues produces byte-for-byte identical output to before this card.

files.description: Beat-firing logic (A layer). THIS card adds ONLY the CASE_CLOSED beat (all five clues) after the existing DEDUCTION, FALSE_ALIBI, MOTIVE_REVEALED beats. No scene/clue changes; scenes.js is frozen. Keep fireBeats(clues, firedBeats) signature.
